component.name: IptvScene

Label.text: Left/Right switch columns OK select/play * actions Replay refresh Back providers
Favorites and recents are saved locally. IPTV-org is included as the built-in playlist source.

component.script:
function init() m.top.setFocus(true)
m.titleLabel = m.top.findNode("titleLabel") m.providerLabel = m.top.findNode("providerLabel") m.messageBackground = m.top.findNode("messageBackground") m.statusLabel = m.top.findNode("statusLabel") m.hintLabel = m.top.findNode("hintLabel") m.groupHeader = m.top.findNode("groupHeader") m.channelHeader = m.top.findNode("channelHeader") m.guideHeader = m.top.findNode("guideHeader") m.groupList = m.top.findNode("groupList") m.channelList = m.top.findNode("channelList") m.guideList = m.top.findNode("guideList") m.footerLabel = m.top.findNode("footerLabel") m.debugLabel = m.top.findNode("debugLabel") m.overlay = m.top.findNode("overlay") m.overlayTitle = m.top.findNode("overlayTitle") m.overlayHint = m.top.findNode("overlayHint") m.overlayList = m.top.findNode("overlayList") m.videoPlayer = m.top.findNode("videoPlayer") m.loadTask = m.top.findNode("loadTask")
m.titleLabel.font.size = 30 m.providerLabel.font.size = 24 m.statusLabel.font.size = 18 m.hintLabel.font.size = 18 m.groupHeader.font.size = 22 m.channelHeader.font.size = 22 m.guideHeader.font.size = 22 m.footerLabel.font.size = 18 m.debugLabel.font.size = 16 m.overlayTitle.font.size = 28 m.overlayHint.font.size = 18
m.groupList.observeField("itemSelected", "onGroupSelected") m.channelList.observeField("itemSelected", "onChannelSelected") m.channelList.observeField("itemFocused", "onChannelFocused") m.overlayList.observeField("itemSelected", "onOverlaySelected") m.videoPlayer.observeField("state", "onVideoStateChanged") if m.videoPlayer.hasField("position") then m.videoPlayer.observeField("position", "onVideoPositionChanged") m.videoPlayer.notificationInterval = 1 end if if m.videoPlayer.hasField("visible") then m.videoPlayer.observeField("visible", "onVideoVisibilityChanged") m.loadTask.observeField("status", "onLoadStatusChanged") m.loadTask.observeField("response", "onCatalogLoaded")
m.state = IptvProviderStore_LoadState() m.catalog = invalid m.visibleChannels = [] m.currentGroupKey = "All" m.currentProviderId = "" m.activeRequestId = 0 m.focusArea = "group" m.overlayMode = "" m.dialogMode = "" m.pendingConfig = invalid m.isLoading = false m.debugHistory = [] m.searchQuery = "" m.searchActive = false m.playbackSessionId = 0 m.playbackStarted = false m.playbackEnded = false m.playbackUserStopRequested = false m.playbackStatusShown = false m.playbackCurrentTitle = "" m.playbackCurrentUrl = "" m.playbackCurrentFormat = "" m.playbackLastPosition = 0 m.playbackCurrentChannelId = "" m.playbackCurrentChannelIndex = -1
updateFocusHeaders() bootstrap() end function
sub bootstrap() if m.state.providers.Count() = 0 then showLoadingPlaceholders("Sample feed is ready to install.") showSetupOverlay() showStatus("info", "Add a provider to start browsing live TV.") else providerId = m.state.selectedProviderId if providerId = "" then providerId = m.state.providers[0].id m.state = IptvProviderStore_RefreshBuiltInProvider(m.state, providerId) IptvProviderStore_SaveState(m.state) loadProvider(providerId) end if end sub
function onKeyEvent(key as String, press as Boolean) as Boolean if not press then return false
if m.videoPlayer.visible then if key = "back" then stopPlayback() return true else if key = "up" then surfPlaybackChannel(-1) return true else if key = "down" then surfPlaybackChannel(1) return true else if key = "OK" then showPlaybackInfo() return true else if key = "options" then showPlaybackActionsOverlay() return true end if return true end if
if m.overlay.visible then if key = "back" or key = "options" or key = "left" then closeOverlay() return true end if return false end if
if key = "left" then setFocusArea("group") return true else if key = "right" then setFocusArea("channel") return true else if key = "options" then showActionsOverlay() return true else if key = "back" then showProviderOverlay() return true else if key = "replay" then refreshCurrentProvider() return true end if
return false end function
sub loadProvider(providerId as Dynamic) m.state = IptvProviderStore_RefreshBuiltInProvider(m.state, providerId) IptvProviderStore_SaveState(m.state) provider = Iptv_FindProviderById(m.state.providers, providerId) if provider = invalid then showLoadingPlaceholders("Choose a provider to continue.") showSetupOverlay() showStatus("error", "No provider is configured yet.") return end if
nextRequestId = m.activeRequestId + 1 if m.isLoading then m.loadTask.control = "STOP" appendDebug("Load overridden by " + provider.title) end if
m.activeRequestId = nextRequestId m.isLoading = true m.currentProviderId = provider.id clearSearchState() m.providerLabel.text = provider.title + " [" + Iptv_Upper(provider.kind) + "]" options = Iptv_GetProviderOptions(provider) if options.largeFeed then showLoadingPlaceholders("Loading built-in playlist ...") showStatus("info", "Loading built-in playlist from " + Iptv_HostLabel(provider.endpoint) + " ...") else showLoadingPlaceholders("Loading channels and guide data ...") showStatus("info", "Loading provider data from " + Iptv_HostLabel(provider.endpoint) + " ...") end if appendDebug("Load started: " + provider.title + " (#" + nextRequestId.ToStr() + ")") m.loadTask.request = { provider: provider, requestId: nextRequestId } m.loadTask.control = "RUN" end sub
sub onCatalogLoaded() response = m.loadTask.response if response = invalid then return
responseRequestId = 0 if response.DoesExist("requestId") then responseRequestId = response.requestId if responseRequestId <> m.activeRequestId then appendDebug("Ignored stale load response #" + responseRequestId.ToStr()) return end if
m.isLoading = false m.catalog = response stageLabel = "" if response.DoesExist("metadata") and response.metadata <> invalid and response.metadata.DoesExist("stage") then stageLabel = Iptv_SafeString(response.metadata.stage) end if selectedProviderId = Iptv_SafeString(response.providerId) if selectedProviderId = "" then selectedProviderId = m.currentProviderId m.state = IptvProviderStore_SetSelectedProvider(m.state, selectedProviderId) IptvProviderStore_SaveState(m.state) clearSearchState()
isLargeBuiltIn = Iptv_SafeString(response.providerId) = "iptv-org"
groups = ["Favorites", "Recents"] if not (isLargeBuiltIn and response.groups.Count() > 0) then groups.Push("All") end if for each groupTitle in response.groups groups.Push(groupTitle) end for
rows = [] for each groupTitle in groups meta = "Filter" if groupTitle = "Favorites" then meta = m.state.favorites.Count().ToStr() + " saved" if groupTitle = "Recents" then meta = m.state.recents.Count().ToStr() + " recent" rows.Push({ title: groupTitle, meta: meta, key: groupTitle }) end for m.groupList.content = Iptv_NewListContent(rows)
if response.channels.Count() = 0 then errorMessage = "This provider returned no live channels." if response.errors.Count() > 0 then errorMessage = response.errors[0] showStatus("error", errorMessage) if stageLabel <> "" then appendDebug("Load failed at " + stageLabel + ": " + errorMessage) else appendDebug("Load failed: " + errorMessage) end if else if response.metadata.DoesExist("isPartial") and response.metadata.isPartial then loadedCount = response.channels.Count().ToStr() showStatus("success", "Showing first " + loadedCount + " channels from " + response.providerTitle + ".") if stageLabel <> "" then appendDebug("Load finished at " + stageLabel + ": partial catalog with " + loadedCount + " channels") else appendDebug("Load finished: partial catalog with " + loadedCount + " channels") end if else if response.errors.Count() > 0 then showStatus("warn", response.errors[0]) if stageLabel <> "" then appendDebug("Load warning at " + stageLabel + ": " + response.errors[0]) else appendDebug("Load warning: " + response.errors[0]) end if else if response.groups.Count() > 0 then showStatus("success", response.channels.Count().ToStr() + " live channels ready across " + response.groups.Count().ToStr() + " groups.") else showStatus("success", response.channels.Count().ToStr() + " live channels ready.") end if if stageLabel <> "" then appendDebug("Load finished at " + stageLabel + ": " + response.channels.Count().ToStr() + " channels") else appendDebug("Load finished: " + response.channels.Count().ToStr() + " channels") end if end if
m.currentGroupKey = "All" if response.groups.Count() > 0 and isLargeBuiltIn then m.currentGroupKey = response.groups[0] end if refreshVisibleChannels() setFocusArea("group") end sub
sub onLoadStatusChanged() status = m.loadTask.status if status = invalid then return
statusRequestId = 0 if status.DoesExist("requestId") then statusRequestId = status.requestId if statusRequestId <> m.activeRequestId then return
stageLabel = "" if status.DoesExist("stage") then stageLabel = Iptv_SafeString(status.stage) messageText = "" if status.DoesExist("message") then messageText = Iptv_SafeString(status.message)
if messageText <> "" then appendDebug("Load stage [" + stageLabel + "]: " + messageText) if m.isLoading and stageLabel <> "load_finished" then showStatus("info", messageText) else if stageLabel <> "" then appendDebug("Load stage [" + stageLabel + "]") end if end sub
sub refreshVisibleChannels() m.visibleChannels = [] if m.catalog = invalid then showEmptyState("No channels", "Load a provider first", "Guide unavailable", "Select a channel to inspect schedule") return end if
if m.currentGroupKey = "Favorites" then for each channel in m.catalog.channels if Iptv_ArrayContains(m.state.favorites, channel.id) then m.visibleChannels.Push(channel) end for else if m.searchActive then query = Iptv_Lower(m.searchQuery) for each channel in m.catalog.channels titleText = Iptv_Lower(channel.title) groupText = Iptv_Lower(channel.group) tvgName = "" if channel.metadata <> invalid and channel.metadata.DoesExist("tvgName") then tvgName = Iptv_Lower(channel.metadata.tvgName) if Iptv_Contains(titleText, query) or Iptv_Contains(groupText, query) or (tvgName <> "" and Iptv_Contains(tvgName, query)) then m.visibleChannels.Push(channel) end if end for else if m.currentGroupKey = "Recents" then channelById = {} for each channel in m.catalog.channels channelById[channel.id] = channel end for for each recentId in m.state.recents if channelById.DoesExist(recentId) then m.visibleChannels.Push(channelById[recentId]) end for else if m.currentGroupKey = "All" then m.visibleChannels = m.catalog.channels else for each channel in m.catalog.channels if Iptv_SafeString(channel.group) = m.currentGroupKey then m.visibleChannels.Push(channel) end for end if
rows = [] for each channel in m.visibleChannels badge = "" if Iptv_ArrayContains(m.state.favorites, channel.id) then badge = "Fav" meta = Iptv_SafeString(channel.group) + " | " + Iptv_SafeString(channel.metadata.nowTitle) rows.Push({ title: channel.title, meta: meta, key: channel.id, badge: badge }) end for
if rows.Count() = 0 then if m.searchActive then showEmptyState("No matches", "No channels matched """ + m.searchQuery + """", "Guide unavailable", "Try another search query") m.channelHeader.text = "Channels | Search: " + m.searchQuery else showEmptyState("No channels", "This filter is currently empty", "Guide unavailable", "Choose another filter or provider") end if return end if
if m.searchActive then m.channelHeader.text = "Channels | Search: " + m.searchQuery showStatus("success", "Showing " + rows.Count().ToStr() + " results for """ + m.searchQuery + """") else m.channelHeader.text = "Channels" end if
m.channelList.content = Iptv_NewListContent(rows) updateGuideForFocusedChannel() end sub
sub onGroupSelected() content = m.groupList.content if content = invalid then return
focused = m.groupList.itemSelected if focused < 0 or focused >= content.GetChildCount() then return selectedNode = content.GetChild(focused) if selectedNode = invalid then return
m.currentGroupKey = Iptv_SafeString(selectedNode.key) clearSearchState() refreshVisibleChannels() setFocusArea("channel") end sub
sub onChannelSelected() playFocusedChannel() end sub
sub onChannelFocused() updateGuideForFocusedChannel() end sub
sub updateGuideForFocusedChannel() if m.visibleChannels.Count() = 0 then m.guideList.content = Iptv_NewListContent([{ title: "Guide unavailable", meta: "No channel is selected", key: "" }]) return end if
focused = m.channelList.itemFocused if focused < 0 or focused >= m.visibleChannels.Count() then focused = 0 channel = m.visibleChannels[focused] if m.searchActive then m.channelHeader.text = "Channels | Search: " + m.searchQuery else m.channelHeader.text = "Channels | " + channel.title end if
programs = [] if m.catalog.guideByChannel.DoesExist(channel.id) then programs = m.catalog.guideByChannel[channel.id]
guideRows = [] if programs.Count() = 0 then if m.catalog.metadata.DoesExist("guideDeferred") and m.catalog.metadata.guideDeferred then guideRows.Push({ title: channel.title, meta: "Guide deferred for large source", key: "" }) else guideRows.Push({ title: channel.title, meta: "Guide unavailable for this channel", key: "" }) end if guideRows.Push({ title: "Source", meta: Iptv_SafeString(channel.streamUrl), key: "" }) if not m.videoPlayer.visible then appendDebug("Guide unavailable: " + channel.title) else limit = programs.Count() if limit > 5 then limit = 5 for i = 0 to limit - 1 program = programs[i] timeLabel = Iptv_FormatClock(program.startTime) if Iptv_IsNonEmptyString(program.endTime) then timeLabel = timeLabel + "-" + Iptv_FormatClock(program.endTime) meta = timeLabel if Iptv_IsNonEmptyString(program.description) then meta = meta + " | " + program.description guideRows.Push({ title: program.title, meta: meta, key: "" }) end for end if
m.guideList.content = Iptv_NewListContent(guideRows) end sub
sub playFocusedChannel() if m.visibleChannels.Count() = 0 then return focused = m.channelList.itemFocused if focused < 0 or focused >= m.visibleChannels.Count() then focused = 0 playChannelAtIndex(focused) end sub
sub playChannelAtIndex(channelIndex as Integer) if m.visibleChannels.Count() = 0 then return
resolvedIndex = channelIndex if resolvedIndex < 0 then resolvedIndex = 0 if resolvedIndex >= m.visibleChannels.Count() then resolvedIndex = m.visibleChannels.Count() - 1 channel = m.visibleChannels[resolvedIndex]
target = IptvPlaybackService_Resolve(channel) if not Iptv_IsNonEmptyString(target.streamUrl) then showStatus("error", "This channel does not have a playable stream URL.") appendDebug("Playback blocked: missing URL") return end if
m.playbackSessionId = m.playbackSessionId + 1 m.playbackStarted = false m.playbackEnded = false m.playbackUserStopRequested = false m.playbackStatusShown = false m.playbackCurrentTitle = channel.title m.playbackCurrentUrl = target.streamUrl m.playbackCurrentFormat = target.streamFormat m.playbackLastPosition = 0 m.playbackCurrentChannelId = channel.id m.playbackCurrentChannelIndex = resolvedIndex
m.videoPlayer.control = "stop" m.videoPlayer.visible = false m.videoPlayer.content = invalid
content = CreateObject("roSGNode", "ContentNode") content.url = target.streamUrl content.title = channel.title if target.streamFormat <> "" then content.streamFormat = target.streamFormat
m.videoPlayer.content = content m.videoPlayer.visible = true m.videoPlayer.setFocus(true) m.videoPlayer.control = "play" m.channelList.jumpToItem = resolvedIndex m.channelList.itemFocused = resolvedIndex m.channelList.itemSelected = resolvedIndex updateGuideForFocusedChannel()
m.state = IptvProviderStore_RememberRecent(m.state, channel.id) m.state = IptvProviderStore_RememberLastWatched(m.state, channel.providerId, channel.id) IptvProviderStore_SaveState(m.state) showStatus("info", "Starting " + channel.title + " ...") appendDebug("Playback session #" + m.playbackSessionId.ToStr() + ": " + channel.title + " [" + Iptv_SafeString(target.streamFormat) + "] " + Iptv_Truncate(target.streamUrl, 72)) end sub
sub surfPlaybackChannel(direction as Integer) if m.visibleChannels.Count() = 0 then return if m.playbackCurrentChannelIndex < 0 then playChannelAtIndex(0) return end if
nextIndex = m.playbackCurrentChannelIndex + direction if nextIndex < 0 then nextIndex = m.visibleChannels.Count() - 1 if nextIndex >= m.visibleChannels.Count() then nextIndex = 0 playChannelAtIndex(nextIndex) end sub
sub showPlaybackInfo() if not m.videoPlayer.visible then return
infoText = m.playbackCurrentTitle if m.playbackCurrentFormat <> "" then infoText = infoText + " | " + Iptv_Upper(m.playbackCurrentFormat)
if m.catalog <> invalid and m.playbackCurrentChannelIndex >= 0 and m.playbackCurrentChannelIndex < m.visibleChannels.Count() then channel = m.visibleChannels[m.playbackCurrentChannelIndex] if channel.metadata <> invalid and channel.metadata.DoesExist("nowTitle") and Iptv_IsNonEmptyString(channel.metadata.nowTitle) then infoText = infoText + " | " + Iptv_SafeString(channel.metadata.nowTitle) end if end if
showStatus("info", infoText) appendDebug("Playback info: " + m.playbackCurrentTitle + " [" + Iptv_SafeString(m.playbackCurrentFormat) + "]") end sub
sub stopPlayback(reason = "user" as Dynamic) if m.playbackEnded then return
resolvedReason = Iptv_SafeString(reason) if resolvedReason = "" then resolvedReason = "user" if resolvedReason = "user" then m.playbackUserStopRequested = true finalizePlayback(resolvedReason) end sub
sub onVideoStateChanged() currentState = m.videoPlayer.state appendDebug("Video state [" + currentState + "]: " + Iptv_VideoDebugSummary(m.videoPlayer, m.playbackCurrentUrl, m.playbackCurrentFormat))
if currentState = "error" then finalizePlayback("error") else if currentState = "finished" then if m.playbackStarted then finalizePlayback("finished") else finalizePlayback("startup-failed") end if else if currentState = "none" or currentState = "stopped" or currentState = "stop" then if m.playbackUserStopRequested then finalizePlayback("user") else if m.playbackStarted then finalizePlayback("finished") else finalizePlayback("startup-failed") end if else if currentState = "playing" then m.playbackStarted = true if not m.playbackStatusShown then m.playbackStatusShown = true showStatus("success", "Playing " + m.playbackCurrentTitle) end if else if currentState = "buffering" then if not m.playbackStatusShown then m.playbackStatusShown = true showStatus("info", "Buffering " + m.playbackCurrentTitle + " ...") end if end if end sub
sub onVideoPositionChanged() if not m.videoPlayer.visible then return if not m.videoPlayer.hasField("position") then return
positionValue = int(m.videoPlayer.position) if positionValue <> m.playbackLastPosition then m.playbackLastPosition = positionValue if positionValue > 0 then m.playbackStarted = true end if end sub
sub onVideoVisibilityChanged() appendDebug("Video visible: " + Iptv_SafeString(m.videoPlayer.visible)) end sub
sub finalizePlayback(reason as Dynamic) if m.playbackEnded then return
m.playbackEnded = true resolvedReason = Iptv_SafeString(reason) if resolvedReason = "" then resolvedReason = "finished"
errorSummary = Iptv_VideoErrorSummary(m.videoPlayer) statusMessage = "" debugMessage = ""
if resolvedReason = "user" then statusMessage = "Stopped " + m.playbackCurrentTitle + "." debugMessage = "Playback stopped by user" else if resolvedReason = "finished" then statusMessage = "Playback finished for " + m.playbackCurrentTitle + "." debugMessage = "Playback finished" else statusMessage = "Playback failed for " + m.playbackCurrentTitle if errorSummary <> "" then statusMessage = statusMessage + ": " + errorSummary debugMessage = "Playback failure" if errorSummary <> "" then debugMessage = debugMessage + ": " + errorSummary end if
m.videoPlayer.control = "stop" m.videoPlayer.visible = false m.videoPlayer.content = invalid
if resolvedReason = "user" then showStatus("info", statusMessage) else if resolvedReason = "finished" then showStatus("info", statusMessage) else showStatus("error", statusMessage) end if
appendDebug(debugMessage) setFocusArea("channel") end sub
function Iptv_VideoDebugSummary(video as Object, streamUrl as Dynamic, streamFormat as Dynamic) as String parts = [] if Iptv_IsNonEmptyString(streamFormat) then parts.Push("format=" + Iptv_SafeString(streamFormat)) if Iptv_IsNonEmptyString(streamUrl) then parts.Push("url=" + Iptv_Truncate(streamUrl, 64))
errorSummary = Iptv_VideoErrorSummary(video) if errorSummary <> "" then parts.Push(errorSummary)
if video <> invalid and video.hasField("position") then parts.Push("position=" + int(video.position).ToStr()) end if
if parts.Count() = 0 then return "no details" return Iptv_JoinDebugParts(parts) end function
function Iptv_VideoErrorSummary(video as Object) as String if video = invalid then return ""
parts = [] if video.hasField("errorCode") then errorCode = int(video.errorCode) if errorCode <> 0 then parts.Push("errorCode=" + errorCode.ToStr()) end if if video.hasField("errorMsg") then errorMsg = Iptv_Trim(video.errorMsg) if errorMsg <> "" then parts.Push(errorMsg) end if if video.hasField("bufferingStatus") then bufferingStatus = Iptv_Trim(video.bufferingStatus) if bufferingStatus <> "" then parts.Push("buffer=" + bufferingStatus) end if
if parts.Count() = 0 then return "" return Iptv_JoinDebugParts(parts) end function
function Iptv_JoinDebugParts(parts as Object) as String result = "" for each part in parts textPart = Iptv_SafeString(part) if textPart <> "" then if result <> "" then result = result + " " result = result + textPart end if end for return result end function
sub refreshCurrentProvider() if Iptv_IsNonEmptyString(m.currentProviderId) then loadProvider(m.currentProviderId) end sub
sub setFocusArea(area as Dynamic) m.focusArea = Iptv_SafeString(area) updateFocusHeaders() if m.focusArea = "channel" then m.channelList.setFocus(true) else m.groupList.setFocus(true) end if end sub
sub updateFocusHeaders() groupColor = "0xFFF2A8FF" channelColor = "0xFFF2A8FF" if m.focusArea = "group" then groupColor = "0x7FD8FFFF" else if m.focusArea = "channel" then channelColor = "0x7FD8FFFF" end if m.groupHeader.color = groupColor m.channelHeader.color = channelColor end sub
sub showStatus(kind as Dynamic, message as Dynamic) resolvedKind = Iptv_Lower(kind) panelColor = "0x20405AFF" if resolvedKind = "success" then panelColor = "0x1B5E3BFF" else if resolvedKind = "warn" then panelColor = "0x705A14FF" else if resolvedKind = "error" then panelColor = "0x7A2424FF" end if
textValue = Iptv_SafeString(message) m.statusLabel.text = textValue m.messageBackground.color = panelColor m.messageBackground.visible = textValue <> "" end sub
sub showSetupOverlay() rows = [ { title: "Use Sample Feed", meta: "Install the packaged demo feed with guide data", key: "setup:sample" }, { title: "Use Built-In Playlist", meta: "Install the IPTV-org public playlist as a provider", key: "setup:default" }, { title: "Add M3U Playlist", meta: "Enter a remote M3U playlist URL", key: "setup:m3u" }, { title: "Add Xtream Provider", meta: "Enter Xtream server URL, username, and password", key: "setup:xtream" } ] openOverlay("Provider Setup", "Choose a source to configure.", rows, "setup") end sub
sub showProviderOverlay() rows = [] for each provider in m.state.providers key = "provider:" + provider.id rows.Push({ title: provider.title, meta: provider.kind + " | " + Iptv_HostLabel(provider.endpoint), key: key }) end for rows.Push({ title: "Use Sample Feed", meta: "Add or restore the packaged sample provider", key: "setup:sample" }) rows.Push({ title: "Use Built-In Playlist", meta: "Add or restore the IPTV-org playlist provider", key: "setup:default" }) rows.Push({ title: "Add M3U Playlist", meta: "Enter a custom playlist URL", key: "setup:m3u" }) rows.Push({ title: "Add Xtream Provider", meta: "Configure Xtream credentials", key: "setup:xtream" }) openOverlay("Providers", "Select a provider or add a new one.", rows, "providers") end sub
sub showActionsOverlay() rows = [ { title: "Switch Providers", meta: "Open configured providers", key: "action:providers" }, { title: "Refresh Current Provider", meta: "Reload channels and guide", key: "action:refresh" }, { title: "Toggle Favorite", meta: "Add or remove the focused channel", key: "action:favorite" }, { title: "Search Channels", meta: "Search the full current provider catalog", key: "action:search" }, { title: "Add M3U Playlist", meta: "Configure another playlist URL", key: "setup:m3u" }, { title: "Add Xtream Provider", meta: "Configure another Xtream source", key: "setup:xtream" } ] if m.searchActive then rows.Insert(3, { title: "Clear Search", meta: "Restore the normal channel list", key: "action:clear-search" }) end if openOverlay("Actions", "Provider management and channel actions.", rows, "actions") end sub
sub showPlaybackActionsOverlay() favoriteAction = "Add Favorite" favoriteMeta = "Save the current channel" if Iptv_ArrayContains(m.state.favorites, m.playbackCurrentChannelId) then favoriteAction = "Remove Favorite" favoriteMeta = "Remove the current channel from favorites" end if
rows = [ { title: "Stop Playback", meta: "Return to the guide and channel browser", key: "playback:stop" }, { title: favoriteAction, meta: favoriteMeta, key: "playback:favorite" }, { title: "Open Providers", meta: "Switch to another provider", key: "playback:providers" }, { title: "Refresh Current Provider", meta: "Reload channels and guide data", key: "playback:refresh" } ] openOverlay("Playback Actions", "Use Up/Down to surf channels while video plays.", rows, "playback") end sub
sub openOverlay(title as Dynamic, hint as Dynamic, rows as Object, mode as String) m.overlayMode = mode m.overlayTitle.text = Iptv_SafeString(title) m.overlayHint.text = Iptv_SafeString(hint) m.overlayList.content = Iptv_NewListContent(rows) m.overlay.visible = true m.overlayList.setFocus(true) end sub
sub closeOverlay() m.overlay.visible = false m.overlayMode = "" if m.videoPlayer.visible then m.videoPlayer.setFocus(true) else if m.state.providers.Count() = 0 then showSetupOverlay() else setFocusArea(m.focusArea) end if end sub
sub onOverlaySelected() content = m.overlayList.content if content = invalid then return
focused = m.overlayList.itemSelected if focused < 0 or focused >= content.GetChildCount() then return row = content.GetChild(focused) if row = invalid then return
key = Iptv_SafeString(row.key) if Iptv_StartsWith(key, "provider:") then closeOverlay() loadProvider(Iptv_Substring(key, 10)) else if key = "playback:stop" then closeOverlay() stopPlayback() else if key = "playback:favorite" then closeOverlay() toggleFavoriteFocusedChannel() else if key = "playback:providers" then closeOverlay() stopPlayback("user") showProviderOverlay() else if key = "playback:refresh" then closeOverlay() stopPlayback("user") refreshCurrentProvider() else if key = "setup:sample" then usePackagedSampleProvider() else if key = "setup:default" then useBuiltInPlaylistProvider() else if key = "setup:m3u" then closeOverlay() openTextDialog("m3u-url", "Add M3U Playlist", "Enter a remote M3U playlist URL", "https://") else if key = "setup:xtream" then closeOverlay() m.pendingConfig = {} openTextDialog("xtream-url", "Add Xtream Provider", "Enter the Xtream server URL", "https://") else if key = "action:providers" then showProviderOverlay() else if key = "action:refresh" then closeOverlay() refreshCurrentProvider() else if key = "action:favorite" then closeOverlay() toggleFavoriteFocusedChannel() else if key = "action:search" then closeOverlay() openTextDialog("search-channels", "Search Channels", "Search all loaded channels for this provider", m.searchQuery) else if key = "action:clear-search" then closeOverlay() clearSearchState() refreshVisibleChannels() showStatus("info", "Search cleared.") end if end sub
sub usePackagedSampleProvider() provider = Iptv_SampleProviderConfig() m.state = IptvProviderStore_UpsertProvider(m.state, provider) m.state = IptvProviderStore_SetSelectedProvider(m.state, provider.id) IptvProviderStore_SaveState(m.state) closeOverlay() loadProvider(provider.id) end sub
sub useBuiltInPlaylistProvider() provider = Iptv_DefaultProviderConfig() m.state = IptvProviderStore_UpsertProvider(m.state, provider) m.state = IptvProviderStore_SetSelectedProvider(m.state, provider.id) m.state = IptvProviderStore_RefreshBuiltInProvider(m.state, provider.id) IptvProviderStore_SaveState(m.state) closeOverlay() loadProvider(provider.id) end sub
sub toggleFavoriteFocusedChannel() if m.visibleChannels.Count() = 0 then return focused = m.channelList.itemFocused if m.videoPlayer.visible and m.playbackCurrentChannelIndex >= 0 and m.playbackCurrentChannelIndex < m.visibleChannels.Count() then focused = m.playbackCurrentChannelIndex end if if focused < 0 or focused >= m.visibleChannels.Count() then focused = 0 channel = m.visibleChannels[focused]
m.state = IptvProviderStore_ToggleFavorite(m.state, channel.id) IptvProviderStore_SaveState(m.state) refreshVisibleChannels()
if Iptv_ArrayContains(m.state.favorites, channel.id) then showStatus("success", channel.title + " was added to favorites.") appendDebug("Favorite added: " + channel.title) else showStatus("info", channel.title + " was removed from favorites.") appendDebug("Favorite removed: " + channel.title) end if end sub
sub openTextDialog(mode as Dynamic, title as Dynamic, message as Dynamic, defaultText as Dynamic) dialog = CreateObject("roSGNode", "KeyboardDialog") dialog.title = Iptv_SafeString(title) dialog.message = Iptv_SafeString(message) dialog.text = Iptv_SafeString(defaultText) dialog.buttons = ["Save", "Cancel"] dialog.observeField("buttonSelected", "onTextDialogClosed") m.dialogMode = Iptv_SafeString(mode) m.top.dialog = dialog end sub
sub onTextDialogClosed() dialog = m.top.dialog if dialog = invalid then return
selected = dialog.buttonSelected textValue = Iptv_Trim(dialog.text) mode = m.dialogMode m.top.dialog = invalid m.dialogMode = ""
if selected <> 0 then return
if mode = "search-channels" then if not Iptv_IsNonEmptyString(textValue) then clearSearchState() refreshVisibleChannels() showStatus("info", "Search cleared.") return end if m.searchQuery = textValue m.searchActive = true refreshVisibleChannels() else if mode = "m3u-url" then if not Iptv_IsNonEmptyString(textValue) then showStatus("warn", "M3U URL entry was empty.") return end if m.pendingConfig = { endpoint: textValue } openTextDialog("m3u-guide", "Optional Guide URL", "Enter an XMLTV URL, or leave blank to rely on the playlist header", "") else if mode = "m3u-guide" then endpoint = Iptv_SafeString(m.pendingConfig.endpoint) title = Iptv_HostLabel(endpoint) provider = Iptv_NewProviderConfig("m3u", title, endpoint, "", "", textValue) saveAndLoadProvider(provider) else if mode = "xtream-url" then if not Iptv_IsNonEmptyString(textValue) then showStatus("warn", "Xtream server URL entry was empty.") return end if m.pendingConfig.endpoint = textValue openTextDialog("xtream-user", "Xtream Username", "Enter the Xtream username", "") else if mode = "xtream-user" then m.pendingConfig.username = textValue openTextDialog("xtream-pass", "Xtream Password", "Enter the Xtream password", "") else if mode = "xtream-pass" then endpoint = Iptv_SafeString(m.pendingConfig.endpoint) title = Iptv_HostLabel(endpoint) provider = Iptv_NewProviderConfig("xtream", title, endpoint, m.pendingConfig.username, textValue, "") saveAndLoadProvider(provider) end if end sub
sub saveAndLoadProvider(provider as Object) m.state = IptvProviderStore_UpsertProvider(m.state, provider) m.state = IptvProviderStore_SetSelectedProvider(m.state, provider.id) IptvProviderStore_SaveState(m.state) m.pendingConfig = invalid clearSearchState() appendDebug("Provider saved: " + provider.title) loadProvider(provider.id) end sub
sub clearSearchState() m.searchQuery = "" m.searchActive = false end sub
sub showLoadingPlaceholders(message as Dynamic) m.groupList.content = Iptv_NewListContent([ { title: "Loading", meta: Iptv_SafeString(message), key: "" } ]) m.channelList.content = Iptv_NewListContent([ { title: "Loading channels", meta: "Please wait", key: "" } ]) m.guideList.content = Iptv_NewListContent([ { title: "Loading guide", meta: "Please wait", key: "" } ]) end sub
sub showEmptyState(channelTitle as Dynamic, channelMeta as Dynamic, guideTitle as Dynamic, guideMeta as Dynamic) m.channelList.content = Iptv_NewListContent([ { title: channelTitle, meta: channelMeta, key: "" } ]) m.guideList.content = Iptv_NewListContent([ { title: guideTitle, meta: guideMeta, key: "" } ]) end sub
sub appendDebug(message as Dynamic) textValue = Iptv_SafeString(message) if textValue = "" then return
m.debugHistory.Push(textValue) while m.debugHistory.Count() > 4 m.debugHistory.Delete(0) end while
latest = m.debugHistory[m.debugHistory.Count() - 1] m.debugLabel.text = "Debug: " + Iptv_Truncate(latest, 120) end sub
